zh.Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agneta Hubbard de Baidon於1453年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾霍爾 恩德時，她的父親John Hubbard de Baidon38歲，母親Isabella Harwell29歲。她於1469年與Richard Fullwood在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1513年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agneta Hubbard de Baidon于1453年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾霍爾 恩德时，她的父亲John Hubbard de Baidon38岁，母亲Isabella Harwell29岁。她于1469年与Richard Fullwood在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1513年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baidon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bardon in Leicestershire, named with Old English berg ‘hill, mound, barrow’ + dūn ‘hill’, meaning ‘barrow hill’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Bárdáin, see Barden 4.

variants.name: Barden
meanings: English: habitational name from Barden Park in Tonbridge, Kent, or Bardown in Ticehurst, Sussex, or Berden in Essex.
English: habitational name from any of the places in North and Yorkshire named Barden, from Old English bere ‘barley’ (or the derived adjective beren) + denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Hubbard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Norman French personal name Hubert (ancient Germanic Hugibert, composed of elements meaning ‘mind, spirit’ and ‘bright’).

variants.name: Hubert
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was popular among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain, where it was later reinforced by settlers from the Low Countries. An 8th-century St Hubert succeeded St Lambert as bishop of Maastricht and is regarded as the patron of hunters, since, like St Eustace , he is supposed to have seen a vision of Christ crucified between the antlers of a stag.

variants.name: Hobart
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, itself representing a variant of the given name   Hubert .  In some cases the given name may derive from the city in Tasmania, named after  Robert Hobart , 4th Earl of Buckingham, who was Secretary of State for War and the Colonies at the time (  1804 ) when it was founded.

en.lifeSummary: When Agneta Hubbard de Baidon was born in 1453, in Hall End, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hubbard de Baidon, was 38 and her mother, Isabella Harwell, was 29. She married Richard Fullwood in 1469, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1513, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

ko.Tanworth,Warwick,England: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 탠워스 인 아든
ko.lifeSummary: Agneta Hubbard de Baidon(이)가 1453년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 홀 드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hubbard de Baidon(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Harwell(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Richard Fullwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1513년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Tanworth,Warwick,England: танворт ин арден, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agneta Hubbard de Baidon родилась в 1453 г. в местности холл энд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hubbard de Baidon было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Harwell, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Fullwood в 1469 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1513 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
